item.title: Olympic runner, Mo Farah has a message for struggling Gen Z: ‘I was a child trafficked, but I never gave up on myself’
item.description: From human trafficking survivor to Olympic champion, Mo Farah has a message for Gen Z: life will knock you down, but your success is your responsibili...

item.title: Discord cuts ties with Peter Thiel-backed verification software after its code was found tied to U.S. surveillance efforts
item.description: Discord cut ties with its age-verification partner after exposed code fueled federal-reporting concerns, months after a breach hit 70,000 users.

item.title: Scientists are pushing back on warnings that microplastics damage your health, saying people are just obese and calling some studies ‘a joke’
item.description: Some scientists are saying previous studies warning of the damage microplastics may cause are exaggerated and are false positives triggered by human f...

item.title: Singapore’s Singtel partners with Nvidia to build a research lab for companies that care about data sovereignty
item.description: Singtel is leaning into its AI and data center business as its mobile services business faces more competition.

item.title: Sam Altman gets defensive about AI’s massive electricity usage: ‘It also takes a lot of energy to train a human’
item.description: Altman said data centers have moved past water-intensive cooling, but 56% globally still use evaporative systems.
